prs.title: Temp sidequest
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Significant feature spanning AWS Marketplace competitor sync infrastructure: new Prisma schema, migration, BullMQ job types, library code for marketplace search, rival sync logic, multiple debug/export scripts, and admin queue actions — a full end-to-end pipeline with real architectural breadth.

prs.title: Jp/atlassian confluence mcp integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Only documentation and TODO planning files added — no functional code changes, making this essentially a trivial notes/planning commit.

prs.title: Ch/refactor/fields
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Major refactor of the readiness data-fields system touching the abstract collector, multiple stage-two collectors, field-completion agent graph/tools/sessions, Prisma schema and migrations, server actions, and architecture docs — a wide-ranging architectural overhaul across AI and data layers.

prs.title: Ch/sm 368
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Solid admin feature adding a chat management UI with filtering, column definitions, a download button, Prisma schema update, and admin nav integration — meaningful but self-contained.

prs.title: Ch/sm 343
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Transformative epic introducing a full Studio document editor (Lexical-based) with AI chat-agent sub-agent integration, comment nodes/plugin/sidebar, new routes and server actions, state management, and package infrastructure — weeks of core platform work.

stories.name: Atlassian Confluence Integration
stories.rationale: Delivered Confluence connectivity through an MCP integration alongside supporting exploratory work to enable teams to connect their Atlassian workspace to Skematic.

stories.name: AI Field Intelligence Refactor
stories.rationale: Refactored the AI fields layer to improve the reliability and maintainability of AI-powered data processing across the platform.

stories.name: Platform Stability & Admin Improvements
stories.rationale: Delivered a set of core platform and admin enhancements addressing tracked issues to improve overall system reliability and operational capabilities.
